name: Braised Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Spareribs, cut crosswise into 3 or 4 sections
2 tbsp Chinese rice wine (or dry sherry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the strips of ribs between the bones into riblets.
2. Stir-fry the spare ribs in a wok over high heat until they are browned in their own fat (about 4 minutes). You may start them with a tablespoon of peanut oil.
3. Drain off excess fat, then add sauce ingredients except chicken broth to the wok and mix well.
4. Add the chicken broth and reduce the heat. Simmer for 60 minutes.
5. Remove the ribs to a serving plate and garnish with chopped scallion tops. The remaining liquid can be skimmed of fat and thickened with cornstarch if desired. Serves 4–6 as a main course.
